case_title: ELIZABETH DRUCK DAVIS ET AL VS. VOLVO CAR FINANCIAL SERVICES U.S., LLC

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY DAVIS, ELIZABETH DRUCK DAVIS, BRYAN KEITH AS TO DEFENDANT VOLVO CAR FINANCIAL SERVICES U.S., LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO VOLVO CAR FINANCIAL SERVICES U.S., LLC (HEARING SET FOR: MAR-04-22 AT 10:00AM)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VOLVO CAR FINANCIAL SERVICES U.S., LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $125) SERVED JAN-10-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VOLVO CAR FINANCIAL SERVICES U.S., LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS ELIZABETH DRUCK DAVIS & BRYAN DAVIS ARE NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT VOLVO CAR FINANCIAL SERVICES U.S., LLC REPRESENTED BY MAKENA COPUS, SR SALES & MARKETING FOR VOLVO CAR FINANCIAL SERVICES. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
